subject: external GPU for Warp?
body:
Hi, 

Is anyone successfully using an external GPU card (via a docking station 
such as Razer Core X Chroma)?  We are using currently one MSI Geforce 
Ventus RTX 2080 8Gt. It seems we are running out of memory and are 
considering adding a second card of the same type, using this external 
device (we cannot fit two cards in the box). But can Warp use an internal 
GPU and an external GPU at the same time?

Best wishes,
Juha
